11a9bf03-a5eb-4a87-af32-fd2d48a154a4.label: counterfactual
11a9bf03-a5eb-4a87-af32-fd2d48a154a4.mechanism: Investors may interpret the macro signal as slower growth rather than lower discount rates.

be42f3d2-258c-4e8c-8858-5d87e31a3c2c.label: regime
be42f3d2-258c-4e8c-8858-5d87e31a3c2c.mechanism: Transmission strength changes when inflation, policy, or recession risk dominates the narrative.
be42f3d2-258c-4e8c-8858-5d87e31a3c2c.novelty_usefulness_note: High usefulness for separating unconditional noise from conditional signal.
be42f3d2-258c-4e8c-8858-5d87e31a3c2c.thesis: The relationship should be stronger in specific macro regimes than in unconditional full-sample analysis.
be42f3d2-258c-4e8c-8858-5d87e31a3c2c.title: Regime-conditional sensitivity
